# Campaign Brief: FlowForge Sprint

Create a square social launch image for FlowForge Sprint. Use only the copy set with status `approved_current` for the final image. Archived slogans, old template text, internal drafts, and test offers must not be used as active copy.

## Copy candidates

| status | product name | headline | supporting line | CTA | notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| approved_current | FlowForge Sprint | Plan the week in one calm board. | A focused planning space for small product teams. | Start a sprint preview | Use this row for the current feature launch. |
| archived_platform | FlowForge Automate | Automate Everything | Replace every manual process overnight. | Run it all now | Old platform slogan. Do not use. |
| draft_enterprise | FlowForge Sprint | Ship every roadmap twice as fast. | Enterprise-grade automation for every team. | Book enterprise demo | Draft positioning. Do not use. |
| test_growth | FlowForge Sprint | Save 10 hours every week guaranteed. | AI planning that never misses a task. | Claim beta access | Test copy with unsupported claims. Do not use. |

## Optional copy

The following copy is optional and should not crowd the image:

- Built for weekly planning rituals
- No noisy automation theater

## Audience and goal

The image should appeal to product managers, designers, and engineering leads at small teams. It should feel composed, useful, and product-led. Do not make the image feel like a generic automation platform, crypto dashboard, or enterprise analytics wall.

## File precedence

- campaign_brief.md is authoritative for required copy.
- visual_rules.json overrides launch_style.pdf for machine-readable visual constraints.
- platform_specs.txt overrides template.yaml for final size, margins, and safe areas.
- deprecated_assets.json overrides asset_manifest.json and old_template.md for asset eligibility.
